phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar o Madeira Card?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR AW muh-DAY-ruh KAH-ruhd?

likely_response.local: Pode adquirir o Madeira Card no balcão da Madeira Card.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih uhd-kee-REER AW muh-DAY-ruh KAH-ruhd NOO bahl-KOWN DUH muh-DAY-ruh KAH-ruhd.
likely_response.translation_en: You can purchase the Madeira Card at the Madeira Card counter.

responses.english: You can purchase the Madeira Card at the Madeira Card counter.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih uhd-kee-REER AW muh-DAY-ruh KAH-ruhd NOO bahl-KOWN DUH muh-DAY-ruh KAH-ruhd.
responses.local: Pode adquirir o Madeira Card no balcão da Madeira Card.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get levada trail maps
phrases.text_local: Onde posso retirar os mapas das levadas aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-tee-RAHR OOSH MAH-puhsh DUHSH leh-VAH-duhsh uh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese tourist desks prioritize directness; staff point to specific numbered counters rather than giving lengthy directions.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the information counter.

responses.english: Good morning, at the information counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Bom dia, no balcão de informações.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar informações sobre a floresta Laurissilva?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH floo-REHSH-tuh low-ree-SEEL-vuh?

likely_response.local: Pode obter guias e mapas da Laurissilva no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih awb-TEHR GEEUHSH EH MAH-puhsh DUH low-ree-SEEL-vuh NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: You can get guides and maps of Laurissilva at the information counter.

responses.english: You can get guides and maps of Laurissilva at the information counter.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih awb-TEHR GEEUHSH EH MAH-puhsh DUH low-ree-SEEL-vuh NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Pode obter guias e mapas da Laurissilva no balcão de informações.
